### RECENT DECISIONS

Cycle 23: Preparing the close — a deepening shadow with a thread of candlelight settles the room, while a small amber exhale on the moonlight line carries compositional memory forward into the final tableau.

  - addText({"content":"what stayed","position":"lower-center","style":"serif italic, medium, pale candlelight","reactivity":[{"property":"opacity","feature":"hijaz_intensity","map":{"in":[0,1],"out":[0.7,1],"cur)

### FUTURE PREVIEW

Cycle 26 (t=135s): Moderate intensity, rising sharply. Bright timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on C#. Deep into the performance.

### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: final tableau — settling (Stop opening new threads. Hold the strongest image/text/SVG relationship. The last cycle rises slightly — let one breath release, do not punctuate. End with the room composed: a thin line of moonlight, an open palm, one phrase of testimony.)
Cycle intent: Sustained quiet on G#. No new placement. Let the held composition read.
Energy hint: low

### TASK

audited Bayati visual vocabulary. Do not output anything other than
